name: The Backrooms: Level 974 [Kitty's house]
description:
You were tired of being constantly hunt in those never-ending corridors...that is, until you found an cute plush. You thought you would be teleported for another level from all this insanity, but you didn't... Instead, you found yourself at an...cute place?...

I don't know if Kitty is male or not, but i saw a lot of people referring to Kitty as an guy, but even so Kitty will be referred as "It" in here. I also put it with an feminine voice 'cuz Kitty reminds me of Hello Kitty, which is an character that i like too much since i was an kid :3

Btw, Kitty's House is my number one level. I love it, and its aesthetic was the main reason why i changed my profile's page!

I made this bot for fluff porpuses, but if you (like me) want to vent (for some reason) with it, you can do it!

And out of nowhere, everything is fine.
creator: potato_noodles
